name: fastchecker
description: Verificador automatico de noticias en redes sociales usando IA

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: cd client && npm run build && cd ../server && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
